entries.speaker: caden
lines: Torren. You bring outsiders to Duskfen.

entries.speaker: torren
lines: I bring people who need help. And who can offer it.

entries.speaker: caden
lines:
The Fenmother is sick. The hollow is poisoned. Our
binding rituals fail. We don't have time for politics.

entries.speaker: edren
lines:
We're not here for politics. We're here because the
ley lines are dying, and that affects all of us.

entries.speaker: caden
lines:
The ley lines? The Fenmother is screaming. The water
tastes of metal. My predecessor walked into the marsh three months
ago and never came back. Don't talk to me about ley lines. Talk
to me about the thing that's killing my home.

entries.speaker: caden
lines: You cleansed her. Not killed — cleansed. That matters.

entries.speaker: caden
lines:
The spirit-speakers at Roothollow will want to hear
of this. Return to Vessa when you can.

entries.speaker: caden
lines:
The Fenmother was poisoned by what's seeping through
the ley lines. If you can cleanse this, you understand what we're
facing. I'll speak for Duskfen at the council.
